importMcp.description: Paste MCP JSON and import it into {{agentName}}.
importMcp.hint: Supports either a full 'mcpServers' object or a plain map keyed by server name.
importMcp.overwriteDescription: Replace existing MCP entries when names already exist.
importMcp.skipDescription: Keep existing MCP entries and import only new names.

editMcp.title: Edit MCP
editMcp.description: Update the local MCP config for {{name}} in {{agentName}}.
